ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code as per the official government standard */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the district is located */,
  "district_code" INTEGER /* District code as per the official government standard */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the district record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the district record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 0-4, 5-9) */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* Starting age of the age range */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* Ending age of the age range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type (e.g., Total, Rural, Urban) */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., total, rural, urban) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disability_types" (
  "disability_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disability type */,
  "disability_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the disability type (e.g., In seeing, In hearing) */,
  "disability_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the disability type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disability_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disability_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disability data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the data is collected */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the data is collected */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location type of the data */,
  "total_persons" INTEGER /* Total number of disabled persons */,
  "total_males" INTEGER /* Total number of disabled males */,
  "total_females" INTEGER /* Total number of disabled females */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disability_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disability_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disability_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disability_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disability_data_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disability data detail entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disability data entry */,
  "disability_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disability type */,
  "total_persons" INTEGER /* Total number of disabled persons of the specific disability type */,
  "total_males" INTEGER /* Total number of disabled males of the specific disability type */,
  "total_females" INTEGER /* Total number of disabled females of the specific disability type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disability_data_details_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES disability_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disability_data_details_disability_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("disability_type_id") REFERENCES disability_types ("disability_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Health Department, Social Welfare Office) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disability data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collector */,
  "collector_email" TEXT /* Email of the data collector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data collection record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data collection record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES disability_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disability data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES disability_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disability data entry */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES disability_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disability data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES disability_data ("data_id")
)
